changeSet.author: gfh
changeSet.comment: Raise antibonus criteria weight 5% -> 15% so disciplinary penalties visibly drop the final rating. Closed periods P1-P4 keep their frozen weight_snapshot in score history, so their stored scores are unaffected; new periods P5-P8 seed history at weight 15.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE criteria SET weight = 15.00, updated_at = '2026-05-20 09:00:00' WHERE id IN (9, 10) AND type = 'ANTI_BONUS';
